subject: [PATCH v3 04/16] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag, VM_UFFD_RWP, to enable read-write protection for userfaultfd. The flag is gated on the CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP configuration option and is used in conjunction with the userfaultfd system call to trap both read and write accesses to protected memory ranges. The patch also introduces helper functions, updates documentation, and adds a new entry to the smaps
